summary: UI/UX Visual Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All styling changes verified. Orange borders on all cards, TREND card fix (trendCardGrad style), white sweep premium effects, team name truncation for overlap prevention - all working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI visual changes verified working correctly. Backend APIs stable (100% pass rate on core endpoints). Frontend styling changes: orange borders (#F5A623) on all major cards across all screens, white sweep premium effect overlays on dark gradient cards, TREND card fix with trendCardGrad style, team name text truncation with numberOfLines={1} and minWidth on score column. No regressions found.
